title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama project: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain LLM integration for Ollama, enabling retrieval-augmented generation and agent workflows with local models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy).

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama with async/tokio support and strong typing.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with builder-style API and Maven Central distribution.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET wrapper for Ollama exposing chat, generate, pull, and list endpoints; includes Blazor sample.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with file uploads, multimodal, and role-based access.

title: ollama-ui
summary: Lightweight React-based chat interface for Ollama served as a single static HTML file.

title: chatbox-ai
summary: Cross-platform desktop client (Electron) supporting Ollama, OpenAI, and other LLM providers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selection and PVC persistence.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and docker-compose examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Experimental Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper for Ollama with conversation history, prompt templates, and shell integration.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-clone using Ollama for local code completion in VS Code.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings Ollama-powered summarization and Q&A to your notes.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and explain code using Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats and answers questions via Ollama backend.
